name: Universite de Pau et du Pays de lAdour
message: The Université de Pau et du Pays de l'Adour was founded in 1972. It is a multi-site establishment, based in Pau, Bayonne, Tarbes, and Mont-de-Marsan and is part of the Academy of Bordeaux - we stole 80GB of data include Docs , reports , billing PDFs , Plans , Factory and payments Documents , Workers full infos , Complete student and Teachers data (Private IDs) , resources and lot more , we will provide decryptor + report + return and delete Data , follow readme to process
